subject: refactor(hooks): collapse focus hooks into single-file guard
body:
useDisclosureFocus and useFocusTrap previously used a .web.ts + .ts
file split. The two files are pointless when the native variant is a
pure no-op — a single file with a Platform.OS === 'web' early-return
in the effect is simpler and matches the useEscapeKey convention used
elsewhere in src/hooks/. File-split pattern stays for cases where the
implementations differ per platform (mapbox.ts / mapbox.web.ts).

Also: refresh CLAUDE.md Architecture hook list and add a docs/TODO.md
entry to wire the same hooks into the remaining disclosures
(HeaderFilters dropdowns, LocationSearch, TutorialModal,
InstallInstructionsModal).

Tags: a11y, hooks, refactor, docs

Urgency: 1
